tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject IDs, sample batch, age, sex, flag for imputation of day of birth, flag for imputation of day saliva sample was produced on 2008 and 2011 collections, item response theory (IRT) cognitive score, and birth year.

variables.name: Sample_Batch
variables.description: Sample batch (Year/Batch when the sample was collected)

variables.name: age
variables.description: Age at saliva collection (2 digit integer measuring years); winsorized for ages > 89 or < 49

variables.name: bdflag
variables.description: Flag for imputation of day of birth

variables.name: s08flag
variables.description: Flag for imputation of day saliva sample was produced, based on the 2008 collection effort

variables.name: s11flag
variables.description: Flag for imputation of day saliva sample was produced, based on the 2011 collection effort

variables.name: yrbirth
variables.description: Birth year. years 1918-1922 and 1959-1964 have each been combined into one group

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample use and sample aliases.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use. Array_SNP: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; Imputation_SNP_CNV: Imputed SNP and CNV genotypes

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Submitted sample ID used in the source repository

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body site where sample was collected, histological type, analyte type, and tumor status.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs, consent information, and subject aliases.

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Submitted subject ID used in the source repository
